data.description: Design a subscription mechanism for knots API that allows clients to receive notifications on knot state changes and updates. Evaluate transport patterns (server-streaming gRPC, bidirectional streams, Server-Sent Events, pub/sub) with consideration for local-first architecture—the API serves both local UI clients (single process) and networked clients (remote). Produce a design document that specifies the chosen pattern, event schema, delivery semantics, and how local vs. networked clients are handled differently.
